article_title: EF Core 性能优化最佳实践（.NET 10）
core_theme: EF Core 数据库查询和写入的性能优化：从 AsNoTracking 到编译查询，从批量操作到慢查询日志
reader_takeaway: 掌握 10 个可落地的 EF Core 性能优化技巧，能按优先级将慢查询的生产应用逐步调优
summary_angle: 把 EF Core 数据库查询从「笨重全字段追踪」优化到「精准投影无追踪」的效率路径，封装为一张流水线式摘要封面

information_blocks.source_anchor: AsNoTracking() 跳过变更追踪降低开销；原文 section 1
information_blocks.visual_idea: 进入管道的原始数据包上有追踪标记，经过过滤器后被剥离

information_blocks.source_anchor: ExecuteUpdateAsync/ExecuteDeleteAsync 直接生成 SQL，不加载实体；原文 section 6
information_blocks.visual_idea: 管道中段一个批量处理器，批量 UPDATE/DELETE 直接飞向数据库

information_blocks.source_anchor: Select() 投影到 DTO 只取必要列；原文 section 7
information_blocks.visual_idea: 管道末端一个投影透镜，将全字段实体压制为精简 DTO 输出

information_blocks.source_anchor: Serilog 慢查询日志监控，原文 section 10
information_blocks.visual_idea: 输出端旁一个监控仪表，高亮慢查询超过 500ms 的告警

main_metaphor: 一个数据库查询优化流水线，数据从入口经多重优化过滤后精准高效输出
primary_subject: 一条抽象的查询优化流水线，由入口追踪剥离、中段批量处理、末端投影瘦身和输出监控四个功能段组成
subject_action: 数据流从管道入口经各优化段处理后高效输出，旁路有监控仪表检测慢查询
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: game concept art illustration, clear hero object, readable environment storytelling, polished lighting, production-art detail
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从风格池随机选中；性能优化主题适合用游戏原画的清晰主体和精良光照来强化流水线各段的层次感和效率对比
style_safety_note: 使用泛游戏概念艺术描述，不涉及具体作品、工作室或艺术家
draft_goal: 验证流水线隐喻是否成立，4 个信息块在宽画面中是否清晰可读
revision_targets: 流水线各段的比例和间距
可见标签是否与信息块对应
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: EF Core database query performance optimization pipeline, from tracking-heavy entity loading to efficient projection and direct SQL operations. The reader should quickly feel the efficiency improvement path of EF Core queries.

Summary angle: Transform slow EF Core database queries from "heavy full-entity tracking" to "lean projected no-tracking" through a pipeline metaphor.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 4 supporting narrative beats. Each beat must map to the article's information blocks rather than generic decoration.
Information blocks:
- Problem: heavy tracking overhead on queries, labeled "免追踪读取"
- Mechanism: bulk ExecuteUpdateAsync/ExecuteDeleteAsync direct SQL, labeled "批量直写" with marker 2
- Step: Select() projection to DTOs fetching only needed columns, labeled "投影瘦身" with marker 3
- Takeaway: Serilog slow query monitoring with >500ms threshold alert, labeled "慢查询监控" with ">500ms"

Main metaphor: A database query optimization pipeline, with data entering from the left, passing through multiple optimization stages, and emerging lean and efficient on the right.
Subject: An abstract query optimization pipeline composed of four functional segments: tracking removal at entry, bulk processing in the middle, projection filtering near the exit, and monitoring panel on the side, with data flow moving diagonally through.
Composition/framing: diagonal forward flow, pipeline segments arranged left-to-right with a slight upward trajectory. Prefer horizontal storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: game concept art illustration, clear hero object, readable environment storytelling, polished lighting, production-art detail. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: deep blue, teal green, warm orange.
Visible text policy: allow only 4 short Chinese labels as specified in information blocks. Each label is short. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: floating chips, neon skyscraper backgrounds, generic robots, fake dashboard axes, fake architecture node names, code rain, HUD overlays, cyberpunk purple-blue light pollution.
